additionalLabels.description: Additional labels for all resources. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
additionalLabels.title: additionalLabels

selectionLabels.description: Labels to be picked up by Alertmanager to add it to base config. Read more about it at [https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.7/rest_api/monitoring_apis/alertmanager-monitoring-coreos-com-v1.html](OpenShift's AlermanagerConfig documentation) under .spec.alertmanagerConfigSelector.
selectionLabels.title: selectionLabels

spec.description: AlertmanagerConfig spec. Read more about it at [https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.7/rest_api/monitoring_apis/alertmanagerconfig-monitoring-coreos-com-v1alpha1.html](OpenShift's AlermanagerConfig documentation).

inhibitRules.description: Inhibition rules that allows to mute alerts when other alerts are already firing.
inhibitRules.title: inhibitRules

route.description: Route definition for alerts matching the resource’s namespace. It will be added to the generated Alertmanager configuration as a first-level route.
route.title: route

spec.title: spec

applicationName.description: Application name. Used as a prefix for all resource names.
applicationName.title: applicationName

defaultVolumesToRestic.description: Whether to use Restic to take snapshots of all pod volumes by default.
defaultVolumesToRestic.title: defaultVolumesToRestic

excludedResources.description: List of resource types to exclude from the backup.
excludedResources.title: excludedResources

includedNamespaces.description: List of namespaces to include objects from. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
includedNamespaces.title: includedNamespaces

includedResources.description: List of resource types to include in the backup.
includedResources.title: includedResources

snapshotVolumes.description: Whether to take snapshots of persistent volumes as part of the backup.
snapshotVolumes.title: snapshotVolumes

storageLocation.description: Name of the backup storage location where the backup should be stored.
storageLocation.title: storageLocation

ttl.description: How long the Backup should be retained for.
ttl.title: ttl

commonName.description: Common name as specified on the DER encoded CSR. This field is not recommended in cases when this certificate is an end-entity certificate. More information can be found in the [cert-manager documentation](https://cert-manager.io/docs/usage/certificate/#:~:text=%23%20Avoid%20using%20commonName,%3A%20example.com).
commonName.title: commonName

dnsNames.description: List of DNS subjectAltNames to be set on the certificate. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
dnsNames.title: dnsNames

duration.description: The requested "duration" (i.e. lifetime) of the Certificate.
duration.title: duration

emailSANs.description: List of email subjectAltNames to be set on the Certificate.
emailSANs.title: emailSANs

ipAddresses.description: List of IP address subjectAltNames to be set on the certificate.
ipAddresses.title: ipAddresses

isCA.description: Mark this Certificate as valid for certificate signing.
isCA.title: isCA

group.description: Group of the issuer resource being refered to.
group.title: group

kind.description: Kind of the issuer being referred to.
kind.title: kind

name.description: Reference to the issuer for this certificate.
name.title: name

keyAlgorithm.description: Private key algorithm of the corresponding private key for this certificate.
keyAlgorithm.title: keyAlgorithm

keyEncoding.description: Private key cryptography standards (PKCS) for this certificate's private key to be encoded in.
keyEncoding.title: keyEncoding

keySize.description: Key bit size of the corresponding private key for this certificate.
keySize.title: keySize

enabled.description: Enables keystore configuration. Keystores configures additional keystore output formats stored in the spec.secretName Secret resource.
enabled.title: enabled

create.description: Enables jks keystore creation for the Certificate. JKS configures options for storing a JKS keystore in the spec.secretName Secret resource.
create.title: create

key.description: Key of the entry in the Secret resource's data field to be used.
key.title: key

name.description: Name of the Secret resource being referred to.
name.title: name

create.description: Enables PKCS12 keystore creation for the Certificate. PKCS12 configures options for storing a PKCS12 keystore in the spec.secretName Secret resource.
create.title: create

key.description: Key of the entry in the Secret resource's data field to be used.
key.title: key

name.description: Name of the Secret resource being referred to.
name.title: name

enabled.description: Enable Private Key for the certificate.
enabled.title: enabled

rotationPolicy.description: Denotes how private keys should be generated or sourced when a certificate is being issued.
rotationPolicy.title: rotationPolicy

renewBefore.description: The amount of time before the currently issued certificate's notAfter time that cert-manager will begin to attempt to renew the certificate.
renewBefore.title: renewBefore

secretName.description: Name of the secret resource that will be automatically created and managed by this Certificate resource.
secretName.title: secretName

subject.description: Full X509 name specification for certificate. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
subject.title: subject

uriSANs.description: List of URI subjectAltNames to be set on the certificate.
uriSANs.title: uriSANs

usages.description: Set of x509 usages that are requested for the certificate.
usages.title: usages

chartVersionOverride.description: Override chart version used in helm.sh/chart label. Useful for stable snapshot testing. @ignore
chartVersionOverride.title: chartVersionOverride

componentOverride.description: Override the component label for all resources.
componentOverride.title: componentOverride

files.description: List of ConfigMap entries. Key will be used as a name suffix for the ConfigMap. Value is the ConfigMap content.
files.title: files

jobs.description: Map of CronJob resources. Key will be used as a name suffix for the CronJob. Value is the CronJob configuration. See values for more details.
jobs.title: jobs

additionalContainers.description: Additional containers besides init and app containers (without templating).
additionalContainers.title: additionalContainers

env.description: Environment variables to be added to the pod. See the README "Consuming environment variable in application chart" section for more details.
env.title: env

envFrom.description: Mount environment variables from ConfigMap or Secret to the pod. Use `nameSuffix` for resources managed by this chart (name will be prefixed with application name), or `name` to reference an existing external ConfigMap or Secret not managed by this chart. See the README "Consuming environment variable in application chart" section for more details.
envFrom.title: envFrom

fluentdConfigAnnotations.description: Configuration details for fluentdConfigurations. Only works for specific setup, see <https://medium.com/stakater/dynamic-log-processing-with-fluentd-konfigurator-and-slack-935a5de4eddb>.
fluentdConfigAnnotations.title: fluentdConfigAnnotations

hostAliases.description: Mapping between IP and hostnames that will be injected as entries in the pod's hosts files.
hostAliases.title: hostAliases

digest.description: Image digest. If resolved to a non-empty value, digest takes precedence on the tag.
digest.title: digest

imagePullSecrets.description: List of secrets to be used for pulling the images.
imagePullSecrets.title: imagePullSecrets

initContainers.description: Add init containers to the pods.
initContainers.title: initContainers

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe. Must specify either one of the following field when enabled: httpGet, exec, tcpSocket, grpc

failureThreshold.description: Number of retries before marking the pod as failed.
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

successThreshold.description: Number of successful probes before marking the pod as ready.
successThreshold.title: successThreshold

timeoutSeconds.description: Time before the probe times out.
timeoutSeconds.title: timeoutSeconds

livenessProbe.title: livenessProbe

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds for which a newly created Pod should be ready without any of its containers crashing.
minReadySeconds.title: minReadySeconds

nodeSelector.description: Select the node where the pods should be scheduled.
nodeSelector.title: nodeSelector

disableTLSArg.description: If disabled `--http-address=:8081` will be used instead of `--https-address=:8443`. It can be useful when an ingress is enabled for the application.
disableTLSArg.title: disableTLSArg

port.description: Port on which application is running inside container.
port.title: port

secretName.description: Secret name for the OAuth Proxy TLS certificate.
secretName.title: secretName

podLabels.description: Additional pod labels which are used in Service's Label Selector.
podLabels.title: podLabels

ports.description: List of ports for the app container.
ports.title: ports

priorityClassName.description: Define the priority class for the pod.
priorityClassName.title: priorityClassName

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe. Must specify either one of the following field when enabled: httpGet, exec, tcpSocket, grpc

failureThreshold.description: Number of retries before marking the pod as failed.
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

successThreshold.description: Number of successful probes before marking the pod as ready.
successThreshold.title: successThreshold

timeoutSeconds.description: Time before the probe times out.
timeoutSeconds.title: timeoutSeconds

readinessProbe.title: readinessProbe

reloadOnChange.description: Reload deployment if attached Secret/ConfigMap changes.
reloadOnChange.title: reloadOnChange

resources.description: Resource limits and requests for the pod.
resources.title: resources

revisionHistoryLimit.description: Number of ReplicaSet revisions to retain.
revisionHistoryLimit.title: revisionHistoryLimit

runtimeClassName.description: Set the runtimeClassName for the deployment's pods.
runtimeClassName.title: runtimeClassName

startupProbe.description: Startup probe. Must specify either one of the following field when enabled: httpGet, exec, tcpSocket, grpc

failureThreshold.description: Number of retries before marking the pod as failed.
failureThreshold.title: failureThreshold

successThreshold.description: Number of successful probes before marking the pod as ready.
successThreshold.title: successThreshold

timeoutSeconds.description: Time before the probe times out.
timeoutSeconds.title: timeoutSeconds

startupProbe.title: startupProbe

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the pods.
topologySpreadConstraints.title: topologySpreadConstraints

volumeMounts.description: Mount path for Volumes. Key is the name of the volume. Value is the volume mount definition.
volumeMounts.title: volumeMounts

volumes.description: Volumes to be added to the pod. Key is the name of the volume. Value is the volume definition.
volumes.title: volumes

files.description: List of ExternalSecret entries. Key will be used as a name suffix for the ExternalSecret. There a two allowed modes: - `data`: Data defines the connection between the Kubernetes Secret keys and the Provider data - `dataFrom`: Used to fetch all properties from the Provider key
files.title: files

refreshInterval.description: RefreshInterval is the amount of time before the values are read again from the SecretStore provider.
refreshInterval.title: refreshInterval

secretStore.description: Default values for the SecretStore. Can be overriden per ExternalSecret in the `externalSecret.files` object.

kind.description: Kind of the SecretStore being refered to.
kind.title: kind

name.description: Name of the SecretStore to use.
name.title: name

secretStore.title: secretStore

extraObjects.description: Extra K8s manifests to deploy. Can be of type list or object. If object, keys are ignored and only values are used. The used values can be defined as object or string and are evaluated as templates.
extraObjects.title: extraObjects

displayName.description: Application Name. Required if `forecastle.enabled` is set to `true`.
displayName.title: displayName

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

contents.description: List of GrafanaDashboard entries. Key will be used as a name suffix for the GrafanaDashboard. Value is the GrafanaDashboard content. According to GrafanaDashboard behavior, `url` field takes precedence on the `json` field.
contents.title: contents

gatewayNamespace.description: Namespace of the Gateway to attach this HTTPRoute to. If not set, the HTTPRoute will be attached to the Gateway in the same namespace as the HTTPRoute.
gatewayNamespace.title: gatewayNamespace

hostnames.description: Hostnames for the HTTPRoute. Values are evaluated as templates.
hostnames.title: hostnames

parentRefs.description: Parent references for the HTTPRoute. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
parentRefs.title: parentRefs

rules.description: Rules for HTTPRoute. Keys and values are evaluated as templates.
rules.title: rules

useDefaultGateways.description: The default Gateway scope to use for this Route. If unset (the default) or set to None, the Route will not be attached to any default Gateway; if set, it will be attached to any default Gateway supporting the named scope, subject to the usual rules about which Routes a Gateway is allowed to claim.
useDefaultGateways.title: useDefaultGateways

tls.description: TLS configuration for ingress. Secrets must exist in the namespace. You may also configure Certificate resource to generate the secret.
tls.title: tls

jobs.description: Map of Job resources. Key will be used as a name suffix for the Job. Value is the Job configuration. See values for more details.
jobs.title: jobs

namespaceOverride.description: Override the namespace for all resources.
namespaceOverride.title: namespaceOverride

partOfOverride.description: Override the partOf label for all resources.
partOfOverride.title: partOfOverride

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of unavailable pods during voluntary disruptions.
maxUnavailable.title: maxUnavailable

minAvailable.description: Minimum number of pods that must be available after eviction.
minAvailable.title: minAvailable

mountPVC.description: Whether to mount the created PVC to the deployment.
mountPVC.title: mountPVC

mountPath.description: If `persistence.mountPVC` is enabled, where to mount the volume in the containers.
mountPath.title: mountPath

storageClass.description: Storage class for volume. If defined, use that value If set to "-" or "", disable dynamic provisioning If undefined or set to null (the default), no storageClass spec is   set, choosing the default provisioner.
storageClass.title: storageClass

groups.description: Groups with alerting rules. Read more about it at [https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/4.7/rest_api/monitoring_apis/prometheusrule-monitoring-coreos-com-v1.html](OpenShift's PrometheusRule documentation).
groups.title: groups

additionalLabels.description: Additional labels for the Role, RoleBinding, ClusterRole, and ClusterRoleBinding resources.
additionalLabels.title: additionalLabels

annotations.description: Annotations for the Role, RoleBinding, ClusterRole, and ClusterRoleBinding resources.
annotations.title: annotations

roles.description: Role definitions scoped to a single namespace.
roles.title: roles

additionalLabels.description: Additional labels for Service Account. If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is set to true, these labels are appended to the service account.
additionalLabels.title: additionalLabels

annotations.description: Annotations for Service Account. If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is set to true, these annotations are appended to the service account.
annotations.title: annotations

create.description: Specifies whether to create a dedicated service account. If set to `true`, a new service account will be created.
create.title: create

name.description: The name of the service account. Behavior based on its value and `rbac.serviceAccount.create`: If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is `false` and `name` is empty, the default service account ("default") is used. If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is `false` and `name` is set, the provided name is used. If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is `true` and `name` is empty, a name is auto-generated using the fullname template. If `rbac.serviceAccount.create` is `true` and `name` is set, the provided name is used for creation.
name.title: name

host.description: Explicit host. If no host is added then openshift inserts the default hostname.
host.title: host

files.description: List of SealedSecret entries. Key will be used as a name suffix for the SealedSecret. Value is the SealedSecret content.
files.title: files

files.description: List of Secrets entries. Key will be used as a name suffix for the Secret. There a three allowed modes: - `data`: Data is base64 encoded by the chart - `encodedData`: Use raw values (already base64ed) inside the data map - `stringData`: Use raw values inside the stringData map
files.title: files

enabled.description: Deploy a [Secrets Store CSI Driver SecretProviderClass](https://secrets-store-csi-driver.sigs.k8s.io/) resource.
enabled.title: enabled

name.description: Name of the SecretProviderClass. Required if `secretProviderClass.enabled` is set to `true`.
name.title: name

provider.description: Name of the provider. Required if `secretProviderClass.enabled` is set to `true`.
provider.title: provider

roleName.description: Vault Role Name. Required if `secretProviderClass.provider` is set to `vault`.
roleName.title: roleName

vaultAddress.description: Vault Address. Required if `secretProviderClass.provider` is set to `vault`.
vaultAddress.title: vaultAddress

clusterIP.description: Fixed IP for a ClusterIP service. Set to `None` for an headless service
clusterIP.title: clusterIP

loadBalancerClass.description: LoadBalancer class name for LoadBalancer type services.
loadBalancerClass.title: loadBalancerClass

endpoints.description: Service endpoints from which prometheus will scrape data.
endpoints.title: endpoints
